summary: Good soundboard capture of a solid 1969 set featuring excellent jams and a terrific Alligator through Feedback.
review: The performance delivers several excellent jams, though the early new‑tune renditions are a bit rough. The highlight is a scorching "Alligator" that flows into "Feedback", making for a quite good set overall. Recording quality isn’t discussed in detail but the source appears to be a soundboard and sounds generally listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review praises the musical performance with standout jams; recording quality is presumed decent based on source type, yielding a solid combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; assumed clean soundboard capture with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Rough new‑tune introductions give way to strong jams later, resulting in a solid overall set.
